close
Autonomous Cybersecurity
SentinelOne delivers autonomous endpoint protection through a single agent that successfully prevents, detects, responds, and hunts attacks across all major vectors.
In 2019 we led SentinelOne’s $120M Series D round.
Sector  Cybersecurity 
Market  B2B 
Investment Team  Jeff Horing  Teddie Wardi  Thomas Krane 
[ ScaleUp: SentinelOne ](https://www.insightpartners.com/ideas/scaleup-milestone-series-sentinelones-ipo/)
close
Insight Onsite - Talent and Marketing
Our Onsite team helped accelerate SentinelOne’s meteoric growth through several deep engagements. Our Talent Center of Excellence helped the team add their CSO and participated in active CMO interview cycles, later working with their CMO to prepare for an IPO.
Onsite’s Talent team sourced SentinelOne’s new VP of Demand Generation to further GTM growth. Prior to this hire, Insight Onsite’s Marketing advisors helped bridge the GTM gap by providing multi-layer support for SentinelOne’s Account-Based (ABX) programs.
Sector  Cybersecurity 
Market  B2B 
Investment Team  Jeff Horing  Teddie Wardi  Thomas Krane 
[ ScaleUp: SentinelOne ](https://www.insightpartners.com/ideas/scaleup-milestone-series-sentinelones-ipo/)
close
Scaling to IPO
Since our initial investment in 2019, SentinelOne has become the defining XDR platform in the market. The company launched strategic products in Ranger IoT and acquired Scalyr which was then rebranded as DataSet – an enterprise data platform.
In 2021 we were thrilled to help SentinelOne prepare for and celebrate their IPO: NYSE: S
Sector  Cybersecurity 
Market  B2B 
Investment Team  Jeff Horing  Teddie Wardi  Thomas Krane 
[ ScaleUp: SentinelOne ](https://www.insightpartners.com/ideas/scaleup-milestone-series-sentinelones-ipo/)

##  We scale ambition at every stage 
For over **30 years** , Insight Partners has helped leaders turn their vision into reality faster and more seamlessly than would be possible alone.
As the trusted partner for more than 800 transformative companies, our deeply experienced software operators, and our flexible capital across every stage of growth, provides everything leaders need to fly faster and further.
[ Contact Us ](https://www.insightpartners.com/contact/)
##  We scale ambition at every stage 
We know what it takes to scale, to be small, and to build an enduring business.
This is why founders choose Insight as a long-term partner. Starting with product-market fit, we bring our operating excellence, our talent and customer networks and our capital to move companies from early to growth stage. We have the team, data and expertise to ensure founders lay the right foundation for accelerated success – and we can support your future capital needs at every stage of your scale up journey.
[ Contact Us ](https://www.insightpartners.com/contact/)
##  We scale ambition at every stage 
We’ve chartered this course before and have the engine you need to truly take off.
Tailor-made for companies at your stage and with deep expertise across every function of a software business, we fill your growth gaps to ensure you scale seamlessly. Our Onsite team of software experts, who’ve walked in your shoes, give you competitive advantage. We’re by your side as you outpace the competition and realize your company’s full growth potential.
[ Contact Us ](https://www.insightpartners.com/contact/)
##  We scale ambition at every stage 
Sophisticated and complex, your needs require nuanced support to drive impact.
With the industry’s most experienced late-stage software experts, entrepreneurs and seasoned executive teams have a powerful partner in Insight Partners.
[ Contact Us ](https://www.insightpartners.com/contact/)

#  Your Startup Journey Begins Here.
Whether you're looking for co-founders, investors, mentorship or want to join a startup, Foundersbase connects you with the people you need to make it happen!
[ Join Now ](https://us.foundersbase.com/signup) [ Learn more ](https://us.foundersbase.com/#how-it-works)
https://www.foundersbase.com/me/emily90 
![Image Description](https://us.foundersbase.com/assets/img/custom/screenshots/home1.png)
####  Networking for Entrepreneurs
Finding the right co-founders and supporters is tough. Foundersbase connects me with people who share my vision and move things forward.
![Image Description](https://us.foundersbase.com/assets/img/160x160/img3.jpg)
#####  Raphael Alstom
CPO @ Volko
##  Find Co-Founders
Connect with like-minded entrepreneurs to build your dream team and start your business.
[](https://us.foundersbase.com/members)
##  Join a Startup
Discover exciting startup projects and join teams to bring innovative ideas to life.
[](https://us.foundersbase.com/startups)
##  Get Startup Support
Find mentors, investors, and other startup supporters to help you grow your business.
[](https://us.foundersbase.com/login)
##  Let's co-found   
startups together!
The most important decision when building a startup company is who you're building it with. Here you'll find intrinsically motivated team members who go the extra mile and beyond.

##  Connect with   
investors and get funded.
Simply upload a pitch deck and get matched with private investors, business angels and institutional funding partners that help your startup reach the next level.
##  Find business angels and institutional funding partners now. 
[ Upload your pitch deck  ](https://us.foundersbase.com/signup)
![Image Description](https://us.foundersbase.com/assets/img/custom/screenshots/screenshot_beta4.png)
![Image Description](https://us.foundersbase.com/assets/img/custom/screenshots/screenshot_beta6.png)
  * 1,500+ private investors
  * Targeted matching
  * Personal connection
  * Free of charge


##  What is foundersbase?
Foundersbase is a networking platform where startup founders connect with co-founders, entrepreneurial talent, and early supporters to build their ventures.   
  
Members from all over the world create profiles, showcase their startup projects, and engage in direct conversations to form a founding team, find advisors and investors, or recruit startup hires.   
  
Unlike broad networking sites, Foundersbase is specifically designed for founder's needs and uses advanced profile curation technology to ensure that every connection is relevant - whether you're looking for a tech co-founder, a marketing expert, or someone to invest early support in your idea.
[ Join us today! ](https://us.foundersbase.com/signup)
https://www.founderio.com/feed
![Founder Community Activity Feed Screenshot](https://us.foundersbase.com/assets/img/custom/screenshots/screenshot_beta4.png)
